insight: On BOSS geek chat, attachment resume requests can render as a consent card with 同意. Prefer clicking the latest visible agree card in .chat-conversation before falling back to generic file upload; the text send button may stay disabled.

Boss auto-greet can look unresponsive when strict filters return zero candidates. Treat empty preview and NO_CANDIDATES as explicit UX states: show a clear empty-result message, a running pending state, and a red stop reason instead of a quiet 0/0 result.
BOSS page.evaluate fetch must set the fetch referrer option; setting Referer as a header is forbidden/ineffective and can make friend/add.json fail with Failed to fetch before any greet succeeds.
BOSS auto-greet local salary prefilter should keep overlapping ranges like 15-30K for a 12-24K request; strict containment can falsely empty search results.

Boss auto-greet with welfare filters can look stuck when BOSS_RAG_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=0 disables the Vite bridge timeout; RAG jobs with brandIndustry=软件/信息服务 were also rejected by industry=互联网 local prefilter even though 双休 welfare keywords were recognized.

In BOSS_AGENT RagReplyStore, PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL can fail with database is locked while normal status reads would still work; keep WAL setup best-effort and preserve busy_timeout for concurrent watcher/frontend access.

BOSS_AGENT frontend auto-greet supports count up to 150, but Vite bridge command timeout must scale with requested count; keep short default for normal commands and compute a longer auto-greet timeout before runBossJsonCommandStream/runBossJsonCommand.

BOSS_AGENT experience filters can be comma-separated; frontend multi-select should send comma-joined labels and local prefilter must treat multi-experience as exact bucket union rather than single-threshold semantics.

agent targets cache fallback must ignore frontend_bridge conversations; those records are local interview sessions with only security_id, and when live Boss refresh fails they surface as unknown company/title cards in the portal.

Boss recent-target lists can contain multiple rows for the same recruiter/job when security_id rotates. Deduplicate cached boss_sync rows by gid/recruiter+job and live recent targets by stable conversation identity before returning portal targets.

When a BOSS CDP profile already has /web/passport/zp/403.html?code=32 open, target selection and watcher preflight must stop before /json/new or Page.navigate; otherwise the portal can repeatedly open new BOSS pages and keep surfacing the access-limited window.

The interview simulator Vite health preflight must not create /json/new about:blank CDP targets or navigate them to BOSS chat. It should only inspect existing CDP targets and ask the user to open chat manually; otherwise merely loading /api/agent/health can spawn Chrome windows/tabs.

For Boss Agent /api/agent/ask, sensitive local-policy intents like contact_exchange must still return a non-empty safe draft; an empty draft is treated by the portal bridge as no usable answer and surfaces as HTTP 502.

In the interview simulator reply workspace, async target refreshes must read current selected target state at resolve time; otherwise a stale loadChatTargets response can overwrite the user-selected Boss target before /api/agent/ask runs.
